clarity.notes: Money state, action priority, and route hierarchy remain explicit across all core flows.

hierarchy.notes: Balance summaries lead, lists stay compact, and sheets are reserved for focused decisions.

typography.notes: A disciplined three-weight sans system and monospace money values improve scanning.

motion.notes: Screen, sheet, toast, and press transitions convey state and honor reduced motion.

brand.notes: The Glassmorphism token contract is preserved while translucency is limited to useful elevation layers.
